programme.title: Sagardwip E Jawker Dhan
programme.desc: A remote island in Southeast Asia harbors Red Mercury, a mythical substance touted as a revolutionary energy solution.

programme.title: Tenida And Company
programme.desc: Friends Tenida Kyabla Pyala and Habul's holiday in Darjeeling takes a dangerous turn, leaving their survival uncertain.

programme.title: Sudhu Ek Bar Bolo
programme.desc: A man shelters a traumatized girl and aiding her in finding hope and love despite difficult circumstances.

programme.title: Don No-1
programme.desc: A down-and-out guy finds his way into the gangster life, using his influence for good. But trouble brews when a more powerful gangster sets his sights on him.

programme.title: Hari Pada Bandwala
programme.desc: Hari Pada Bandwala unfolds compelling drama, romance, and action, highlighting rich character development and cultural storytelling.

programme.title: Agnisapath
programme.desc: Night guard leader Ajit Singh and family killed by terrorist leader in tragic event in Punjab.

programme.title: Classroom
programme.desc: A gripping school drama about a teacher who takes a firm stand to reform troubled students through honesty, discipline, and dedication.

programme.title: Kacher Manush
programme.desc: A touching drama about lifelong friends whose bond is tested by change, loss, and evolving priorities, ultimately revealing the power of connection and sacrifice.

programme.title: Mon Amour Shesher Kabita
programme.desc: Amit Ray, an Indian barrister educated in England, falls in love with Labanya after a chance meeting.

programme.title: Mon Amour Shesher Kabita
programme.desc: Amit Ray, an Indian barrister educated in England, falls in love with Labanya after a chance meeting.

programme.title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
programme.desc: Bhupati Ray tries to sell his haunted palace to clear his debts, but a ghost from his ancestors complicates the process.

programme.title: Highway (2014)
programme.desc: Sohini, Bengali, marries Ashwin, non-Bengali. Feeling lost, they seek to understand each other's perspectives.

programme.title: Meher Aali
programme.desc: Meher Ali falls in love with a Hindu girl. His life takes a drastic turn when he's wrongly imprisoned as a terrorist.

programme.title: Ami Sudhu Tor Holam
programme.desc: Directed by Subrata Halder, Bengali movie stars Soham Chakraborty and Jhilik Bhattacharjee in the lead roles.

programme.title: Byomkesh - Hatyamancha
programme.desc: Byomkesh - Hatyamancha presents thrilling detective investigations, suspenseful mysteries, and clever deductions that keep viewers engaged.

programme.title: Bony
programme.desc: A young woman confronts her mysterious origins when a severe illness triggers unexplainable powers. Facing identity, destiny, and hidden forces in this emotional supernatural drama.

programme.title: Voice Of The Nation
programme.desc: Experts and journalists debate major national issues while presenting strong opinions and diverse viewpoints.

programme.title: Maayakumari
programme.desc: The film's plot spans various eras of Bengali cinema, exploring its evolution.

programme.title: Meher Aali
programme.desc: Meher Ali falls in love with a Hindu girl. His life takes a drastic turn when he's wrongly imprisoned as a terrorist.

programme.title: Tarakar Mrityu
programme.desc: A married couple on a vacation to Kalimpong check into a haunted bungalow, where they uncover a murder mystery.

programme.title: Borun Babur Bondhu
programme.desc: Borun Chakraborthy gains attention after receiving a letter from a renowned friend.

programme.title: Achena Atithi
programme.desc: Prem's grandfather objects to his relationship with Puja. She marries Pratap. After Pratap's death, Puja is arrested for murdering his family members.

programme.title: Aalo
programme.desc: A heartwarming tale of love between a couple in a village.

programme.title: Khelaghar
programme.desc: Khelaghar' is a 2005 Bengali film by Sandip Bagchi, produced by Angel Digital. Starring Shankar Palit, Rumki Bhowmick, Mita Ganguly, Ayan, and Sanjib Bagchi with music by Dr. Santanu Mallik.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Pavalakkodi, a mild-mannered woman, purchases a vintage car with her father. However, they soon discover that it is haunted by a spirit who craves revenge for an unknown incident.

programme.title: Raktakarabi
programme.desc: After a patient's suicide devastates psychologist Satyaki, he retreats to his aunt's house, where he encounters eerie occurrences, including his cousin's death and strange visions.

programme.title: Happy Pill
programme.desc: A lighthearted story blending humor and emotions, where characters navigate life's ups and downs, discovering happiness, relationships, and personal growth.

programme.title: Generation Ami
programme.desc: A 17-year-old boy experiences teenage angst and exhibits rebellious behaviour. He then meets a 19-year-old girl, who helps him be brave and leads him on a journey of self-discovery.
